name: Aeter
description: '''Jay Pittman''' (born March 17, 2007), known professionally as '''Aeter''' (stylized in [[lowercase]]), is a musician from [[Rocky Mount, North Carolina]]. His songs vary from [[plugg]] to [[Indie rock|indie]] and [[alternative rock]]. He has been noted as a major figure in the [[SoundCloud indie]] music scene by publications such as ''[[Pitchfork (website)|Pitchfork]]'' and ''[[The Fader]]''.
